chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 335 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1910/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.1541/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 26.03.2025 M/s Sarfraz A. Akhund and Qadeer Ahmed Shaikh, Advocates filed vakalatnama on behalf of the Petitioner, same is taken on record. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. It is case of the Petitioner that after the decision on the Representation, Second Appeal in view of Regulation 161 of Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment, Management) Regulations, 2023, was filed on 28.01.2025 by the Petitioner and it was required to be decided within 10 (ten) days; however, the same has not been decided. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh present in Court in connection with other matters waives notice of this Petition and submits that he has no objection, if directions are issued to the respondents for deciding the Appeal (if pending) of the petitioner in accordance with the law. In view of the above, this Petition is disposed of. However, respondents are directed to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner within 10 (ten) days in accordance with the law, after receipt of this order. Judge Judge ARBROHI
